summary: DeepSeek GOAWAY: ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR 해결 확인, but EventStream 여전히 0 events. DuckDuckGo: duckduckgo_json 템플릿 → generic error (Vercel AI SDK 형식 불일치).

results.response_body: Failed to load response data — Request with the provided ID has already finished loading
results.console_errors: WebAssembly MIME type warnings only (unrelated to SSE)
results.root_cause_analysis: GOAWAY successfully terminates H2 connection cleanly, preventing ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on subsequent requests (create). However, EventStream still 0 events because APF sends SSE body as single completed H2 DATA frame with END_STREAM, not as streaming chunks. Chrome EventStream parser requires incremental DATA frames to parse SSE events in real-time.

results.response_body: Nothing to preview — This request has no response data available
results.ui_message: 이런... Duck.ai를 일시적으로 사용할 수 없습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도하세요.
results.root_cause: duckduckgo_json template sends OpenAI-format JSON response. DuckDuckGo frontend expects Vercel AI SDK stream format (text-delta with r.text field). Format mismatch causes generic error.

key_findings.deepseek_goaway: h2_goaway=1 successfully prevents ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR. Connection terminates cleanly. But does NOT fix EventStream 0 events — root cause is non-streaming H2 response.
key_findings.deepseek_next_step: Need true H2 streaming: send DATA frames without END_STREAM flag, with delays between events, to simulate real SSE streaming.
key_findings.duckduckgo_next_step: Need new template using Vercel AI SDK stream format. text-delta type with {text:'warning message'} field instead of OpenAI choices/delta format.
key_findings.cumulative_changes_tested: B29(Content-Length removal) + charset removal + event:message prefix + h2_goaway=1

overall_verdict: PARTIAL_SUCCESS — GOAWAY solves ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR but core SSE/warning delivery still unsolved for both services
